title: Smiles of a Summer Night
actors: Ulla Jacobsson, Eva Dahlbeck, Harriet Andersson
plot: In Sweden at the turn of the century, members of the upper class and their servants find themselves in a romantic tangle that they try to work out amidst jealousy and heartbreak.
awards: Nominated for 3 BAFTA 2 wins & 5 nominations total
